arts.ttl: Preview: Strasbourg vs. Auxerre - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Strasbourg and Auxerre, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Strasbourg ended 2024 on a high having won two and draw one of their final three games of the year. By comparison, Auxerre failed to win their final four games, losing twice. Strasbourg have been so...
